levels.attention: Pay attention — context is filling up.
levels.warning: Possible degradation — consider /compact or a subagent.
levels.critical: Severe degradation — consider starting a fresh session.

sessionNotResumable.message: This session could not be resumed — it no longer exists at the provider.

fileOperations.contentDisplayed: The file content is displayed in the diff view above

interactive.title: Interactive Prompt
interactive.waiting: Waiting for your response in the CLI
interactive.instruction: Please select an option in your terminal where Claude is running.
interactive.instructionDetail: In the CLI, you would select this option interactively using arrow keys or by typing the number.

permissions.retry: Permission saved. Retry the request to use the tool.
permissions.error: Unable to update permissions. Please try again.

todo.updated: Todo list has been updated successfully

usageLimit.resetAt: Claude usage limit reached. Your limit will reset at **{{time}} {{timezone}}** - {{date}}

descriptions.default: Only trusted commands (ls, cat, grep, git status, etc.) run automatically. Other commands are skipped. Can write to workspace.
descriptions.auto: A model classifier decides per tool call whether to approve or deny. Hands-off, but safer than Bypass — denials still happen.
descriptions.acceptEdits: All commands run automatically within the workspace. Full auto mode with sandboxed execution.
descriptions.bypassPermissions: Full system access with no restrictions. All commands run automatically with full disk and network access. Use with caution.
descriptions.plan: Planning mode - no commands are executed

gemini.description: Control how Gemini CLI handles operation approvals.

default.title: Standard (Ask for Approval)
default.description: Gemini will prompt for approval before executing commands, writing files, and fetching web resources.

autoEdit.title: Auto Edit (Skip File Approvals)
autoEdit.description: Gemini will automatically approve file edits and web fetches, but will still prompt for shell commands.

yolo.title: YOLO (Bypass All Permissions)
yolo.description: Gemini will execute all operations without asking for approval. Exercise caution.

input.placeholder: Type / for commands, @ for files, or ask {{provider}} anything...

hintText.ctrlEnter: Ctrl+Enter to send • Shift+Enter for new line
hintText.enter: Enter to send • Shift+Enter for new line

input.clickToChangeMode: Click to change permission mode (or press Tab in input)

selector.title: Effort Level
selector.description: Controls how much compute Claude dedicates to your request
selector.tip: ultracode activates maximum depth with multi-agent formatting — ultracode and max add color cues

auto.name: auto
auto.description: Model picks effort by request complexity

low.name: low
low.description: Fast, light — best for simple questions

providerSelection.title: Choose Your AI Assistant
providerSelection.description: Select a provider to start a new conversation

readyPrompt.claude: Ready to use Claude with {{model}}. Start typing your message below.
readyPrompt.cursor: Ready to use Cursor with {{model}}. Start typing your message below.
readyPrompt.codex: Ready to use Codex with {{model}}. Start typing your message below.
readyPrompt.gemini: Ready to use Gemini with {{model}}. Start typing your message below.
readyPrompt.antigravity: Ready to use Antigravity (agy). The model is chosen from agy's own settings.
readyPrompt.opencode: Ready to use OpenCode with {{model}}. Start typing your message below.
readyPrompt.default: Select a provider above to begin

providerSelection.pressToSearch: Press <kbd>{{shortcut}}</kbd> to search sessions, files, and commits

continue.title: Continue your conversation
continue.description: Ask questions about your code, request changes, or get help with development tasks

messages.perfWarning: All messages loaded — scrolling may be slower. Click "Scroll to bottom" to restore performance.

selectProject.title: Select a Project
selectProject.description: Choose a project to open an interactive shell in that directory

projectSelection.startChatWithProvider: Select a project to start chatting with {{provider}}
